title: Sakshi Gemini Extraction Response
description: The response_schema that constrains Gemini's extraction output BEFORE sanitize.py runs. It is STRUCTURALLY INCAPABLE of holding victim identity: there are simply no fields for victim, survivor, name, age, address, family, school, workplace, photo, contact, email, or geo. additionalProperties:false at every level forbids any such field from appearing. Gemini summarizes ALREADY-PUBLIC text only and must never generate factual claims; every emitted field must trace to a source excerpt. The 'victim' field is a required constant that MUST be null. This schema mirrors only the non-PII fields of the published record.

victim.description: MUST be null. Present solely to force the model to emit an explicit null. Victim identity is never ingested (BNS s.72; POCSO s.23). The post-extraction sanitizer additionally strips any PII-shaped field.

cnr.description: Court Case Number (CNR) when present in the public text.

incident_reported_date.description: Date the case was publicly reported/registered. ISO YYYY-MM-DD.

minor_involved.description: Whether a minor is involved. The ONLY age-related fact permitted; no actual age may be emitted.

status.description: Judicial status inferred strictly from the public source text.

next_hearing.description: Next hearing date if stated, else null. ISO YYYY-MM-DD.

summary.description: One-paragraph neutral, non-graphic summary. Must contain NO victim details.

confidence.description: Model's extraction confidence 0..1. Values below 0.8 are quarantined for human review.

retrieved.description: Date the source was retrieved. ISO YYYY-MM-DD.

sources.description: Citable public sources backing the extracted fields.
